overall.description: Gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Odyssey showing exploration of the Sanctuary of Delphi. The character walks past bronze horse statues, along the Temple of Apollo colonnade, and up through sanctuary grounds to a monumental bronze statue terrace, featuring clear sunny weather and autumn foliage.

agents.ego_description: walking toward the Temple of Apollo past the bronze horse statues

notable_agents.action: two NPCs sitting on a stone bench conversing near the temple steps

entered.detail: four large bronze horse statues in a row forming a monumental sculpture
classical Greek temple with tall Doric columns and triangular pediment
irregular cobblestone ground surface with scattered flower petals
rocky mountain terrain with sparse vegetation rising behind the temple

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a view of four bronze horse statues in front of the Temple of Apollo at Delphi. The character walks forward along the cobblestone approach, passing NPCs seated on benches to the left, with the temple's grand colonnade dominating the center view.

events.description: character continues walking along the temple side passing terracotta storage pots

agents.ego_description: walking along the side of the temple colonnade in shade

notable_agents.action: NPC in yellow tunic walking toward the camera along the path

entered.detail: row of tall stone columns supporting the temple entablature
low stone wall lining the right side of the walkway
tall narrow evergreen trees growing along the wall
large clay storage vessels arranged near the temple base

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the shaded side of the Temple of Apollo, with the colonnade columns passing by on the left. Terracotta pots line the temple base while cypress trees grow along a stone wall to the right. An NPC in yellow clothing approaches from the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: sanctuary terrace with fire braziers and market stalls

events.description: exiting the temple colonnade into the open sanctuary terrace area with fire braziers

agents.ego_description: walking through the sanctuary grounds toward the upper terrace stairs

notable_agents.action: vendor in red cloak standing near market stall with goods displayed

entered.detail: wide stone steps leading up to the upper sanctuary terrace
metal bowls with burning flames on decorative stands
tall bronze human figure statue on a stone pedestal
wooden stalls with awnings selling goods and pottery

segments.scene_description: Exiting the temple colonnade, the scene opens into a sunlit sanctuary terrace with burning fire braziers and market stalls. The character walks toward stone stairs leading up to a large bronze statue visible in the distance, while a vendor in red stands near stalls on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper terrace with monumental bronze statue

events.description: ascending stone stairs toward the large bronze statue on the upper terrace

agents.ego_description: climbing the stone stairs to approach the large bronze statue

notable_agents.action: child NPC in blue clothing standing near the base of the statue terrace

entered.detail: rectangular stone altar with carved decorative borders
painted ceramic vessels placed on the ground near the altar
retaining walls supporting the upper sanctuary level

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the stone stairs to the upper terrace, approaching a monumental bronze statue of a standing male figure. Decorative urns and a stone altar sit to the left, while the temple complex becomes visible in the background. A child NPC stands near the terrace edge.

scene_state.functional_zone: sanctuary overlook with view of Temple of Apollo

events.description: panning camera to reveal the Temple of Apollo from the terrace overlook

agents.ego_description: panning around the terrace to observe the sanctuary and temple from above

notable_agents.action: two NPCs standing and conversing near the temple steps below

entered.detail: Temple of Apollo viewed from the rear terrace overlook with full facade visible
tall ceremonial fire stands with spiral decorations

segments.scene_description: From the upper terrace, the camera pans to reveal the Temple of Apollo from a commanding overlook position. Stone braziers burn on the left while the sanctuary grounds stretch out below. Two NPCs converse near the temple steps as the view encompasses the entire sacred complex.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the grounded approach of the Temple of Apollo up to a commanding overlook of the entire sanctuary. It begins by passing four bronze horse statues and seated NPCs along a cobblestone path that leads directly toward the temple's grand colonnade. As the camera moves into the shade of the temple, the view shifts to a rhythmic procession of columns and terracotta pots before opening into a sunlit terrace filled with burning braziers and market stalls. The scene then ascends a set of stone stairs, passing a decorative altar to reach a monumental bronze statue of a standing male figure. Finally, the camera pans away from the statue to reveal a sweeping vista of the sanctuary grounds and the Temple of Apollo stretching out below.
